title: Bad Guy
album: WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?
why_this_song: Bad Guy by Billie Eilish (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'm that bad type"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Sleepin', you're on your tippy toes"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Don't say thank you or please"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "So you're a tough guy"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Like it really rough guy"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I like it when you take control
Even if you know that you don't
Own me, I'll let you play the role

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "type" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "type" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: White shirt now red, my bloody nose

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Sleepin', you're on your tippy toes
But she won't sing this song

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Bad Guy" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Bad Guy" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Bad Guy" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Bad Guy"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Billie Eilish one question about "Bad Guy", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Billie Eilish sobre "Bad Guy", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
